mnemonics.title: MAC Functions
mnemonics.content: CCT: Collision Avoidance, Channel Access, Token management

visualTips.visualization: Imagine 3 people (A-B-C) where A and C can't hear each other but both talk to B simultaneously
Picture a baton being passed around a track team - only who holds it can speak

analogies.analogy: Like people trying to speak in a crowded room - they wait for silence and apologize if they interrupt
Like a conference with a speaking stick - only the holder can talk
